description: This file defines the main page component for browsing recipes, including UI elements for filters, recipe listing, and recipe detail components, using React and Next.js.

methods.name: RecipeCard
methods.description: A React component that renders a card UI for a single recipe including image, title, description, ratings, and tags.

methods.name: BrowsePage
methods.description: Main React component for the recipe browsing page, managing state for filters, querying the API, and rendering the list of recipes.
